MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar; dismissal on file. JUDGE TERI JACKSON; Clerk EBura/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Aug-10-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2015 Set For Trial On Sep-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Under Seal Portions Of Plaintiff Mallory Bargers Medical Records
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JASNA VELEDAR of Hooshmand Law Group, Tel No. (415) 318-5709 appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MALLORY BARGER'S Motion To File Under Seal Portions Of Plaintiff Mallory Bargers Medical Records is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
